promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Do not promote to A2-1 kernel law from this batch without a later explicit selective promotion pass.

selection_basis.queue_reason: Selected as the next strong sims intake batch after the oprole8 harness reduction and as the next raw-order bundle before the deferred sim_suite_v2 successor bundle.
selection_basis.parent_reason: The parent batch already isolates the exact seams needed for second-pass reduction: ten-descendant bundle identity, full repo-top evidence coverage with split current provenance, aligned-four versus migrated-six descendant split, Stage16 payload identity under version drift, Negctrl successor-hash crossover, and the explicit successor-bundle boundary.
selection_basis.comparison_anchor_reason: The sims evidence-boundary reduction was used for the nearest evidence-coverage versus provenance-admission comparison, the oprole8 reduction was used for the nearest run_sim_suite_v1 hash mismatch against a different current emitter path, and the Axis4 directional reduction was used for the nearest dedicated Axis4 producer-path separation pattern.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Deferred to the next bounded step because the parent batch explicitly preserves sim_suite_v2 as the adjacent but separate successor bundle.
Not selected because this thread prefers existing intake artifacts over raw-source rereads unless a parent batch proves insufficient.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent sim_suite_v1 intake batch plus the existing sims evidence-boundary, oprole8 harness reduction, and Axis4 directional reduction were sufficient to isolate bundle identity, split provenance, aligned versus migrated descendant subsets, and the Stage16/Negctrl drift seams.

candidate_items.name: SIM_SUITE_V1_TEN_DESCENDANT_BUNDLE_EMISSION_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves sim_suite_v1 as the executable source that emits ten stored descendants in one bundle surface.

candidate_items.name: ALL_TEN_DESCENDANTS_EVIDENCED_WITH_SPLIT_CURRENT_PROVENANCE_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent batch's central contradiction: full top-level evidence coverage without uniform current producer attribution.

candidate_items.name: ALIGNED_FOUR_VERSUS_MIGRATED_SIX_DESCENDANT_SPLIT_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the clean aligned subset while keeping the larger migrated subset explicit and descendant-specific.

candidate_items.name: STAGE16_V4_PAYLOAD_IDENTITY_WITH_VERSION_AND_PROVENANCE_DRIFT_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the strongest Stage16 warning packet by holding version drift, byte identity, and shifted provenance together.

candidate_items.name: NEGCTRL_V2_SUCCESSOR_HASH_CROSSOVER_WITH_METRIC_CONTINUITY_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the Negctrl branch as a cross-bundle continuity seam rather than a clean rename or producer-continuity path.

candidate_items.name: SIM_SUITE_V2_SUCCESSOR_BUNDLE_BOUNDARY_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the explicit non-merge boundary between sim_suite_v1 and the successor v2 bundle.

quarantined_items.name: TEN_EMITTED_DESCENDANTS_AS_ONE_UNIFORM_CURRENT_BUNDLE_PRODUCER_PATH
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent batch explicitly preserves split current provenance across multiple hashes rather than one uniform current bundle path.

quarantined_items.name: ALIGNED_FOUR_SUBSET_AS_BUNDLE_WIDE_PROVENANCE_RULE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The clean aligned subset is real but does not generalize to the whole bundle.

quarantined_items.name: DEDICATED_OR_SUCCESSOR_PROVENANCE_AS_ERASURE_OF_BUNDLE_EMISSION
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Migrated current provenance does not erase the bundle's direct emission of those descendants.

quarantined_items.name: STAGE16_VERSION_LABELS_AS_PAYLOAD_CHANGE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent batch explicitly preserves byte identity across the stored Stage16 V4 and V5 payloads.

quarantined_items.name: NEGCTRL_V2_TO_V3_AS_CLEAN_RENAME_AND_PRODUCER_CONTINUITY
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent batch explicitly preserves metric continuity alongside version drift and cross-bundle provenance crossover.

quarantined_items.name: SIM_SUITE_V1_AND_V2_AS_ONE_BOUNDED_BUNDLE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Raw adjacency and hash overlap are not enough to erase the successor-bundle boundary.

reasons_for_candidate_status: These candidates isolate the parent batch's strongest reusable packets: ten-descendant bundle identity, full top-level evidence coverage with split current provenance, aligned-versus-migrated subset structure, Stage16 payload-identity drift, Negctrl crossover drift, and the explicit successor-bundle boundary.
They preserve sim_suite_v1 as a bounded executable bundle without letting evidence coverage or partial provenance alignment overstate one clean current producer story.
They remain small, contradiction-preserving, and proposal-side for later bundle-lineage synthesis.
reasons_for_quarantine_status: These items remain bundle-global provenance overreads, subset overreads, emission-erasure overreads, version-label overreads, or adjacency-merging overreads rather than clean reusable A2-2 surfaces.
The parent batch is strong enough to preserve them as warnings, but not to promote them into current law.
notes: Operated from existing intake artifacts after prior required control-surface reads.
Used the sims evidence-boundary reduction, oprole8 harness reduction, and Axis4 directional reduction as comparison anchors.
No raw core-doc reread was needed for this bounded sim_suite_v1 descendant-provenance reduction pass.
